name: Curried Chicken (Clay Pot)
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Chicken, cut into serving pieces
1/4 cup Dried apricots, chopped into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the clay pot in cold water for 10 minutes.
2. Place the chicken in the pot and add the oil, curry powder, onion, carrots, apricots, tomato puree, and chicken broth. Cover and place in a preheated oven set to 450F (232C).
3. Cook for 1 hour. Stir the butter and flour together, then combine with the juices from the pot.
4. Add the peas and sprinkle the cooked coconut over the chicken.
5. Continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes. Serve with rice and chutney.
